channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sophie Cunningham stands by her stance on men in women's sports
Saudi nuclear deal raises alarms; Lindsey Graham's death opened door
item.description: The late Sen. Lindsey Graham had a dying wish for a U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal, which he pursued behind the scenes.

item.title: Far-left 'Squad' Democrats mistakenly target Jewish colleagues in failed attack
item.description: Moderate Rep. Josh Gottheimer clashed online with 'Squad' members after Rep. Summer Lee appeared to confuse him with Gov. Josh Shapiro.

item.title: Hamas attack survivor criticizes Mamdani over 'dangerous' Netanyahu video
item.description: Mazal Tazazo said a video by NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani calling Netanyahu a 'war criminal' is 'dangerous.'
